translations.vi: Anh trai tôi là nhạc sĩ.

sentences.target: Der Musiker spielt heute im Park.

translations.de: Der Musiker spielt heute im Park.
translations.en: The musician is playing in the park today.
translations.es: El músico toca hoy en el parque.
translations.fr: Le musicien joue aujourd’hui dans le parc.
translations.it: Il musicista suona oggi al parco.
translations.zh-Hans: 那位音乐家今天在公园演出。
translations.yue: 嗰位音樂家今日喺公園表演。
translations.pt: O músico vai tocar no parque hoje.
translations.vi: Người nhạc sĩ biểu diễn ở công viên hôm nay.
translations.nl: De muzikant speelt vandaag in het park.
translations.hu: A zenész ma a parkban játszik.
translations.hi: संगीतकार आज पार्क में बजा रहा है.
translations.el: Ο μουσικός παίζει σήμερα στο πάρκο.
translations.nb: Musikeren spiller i parken i dag.
translations.id: Musisi itu tampil di taman hari ini.
translations.sv: Musikern spelar i parken i dag.
translations.da: Musikeren spiller i parken i dag.
translations.ja: その音楽家は今日公園で演奏します。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, masculine singular nominative; marks 'Musiker' as the subject.
Masculine common noun, singular, nominative; syntactic subject of 'spielt'.
Finite main verb, 3rd person singular present; denotes the action performed by the subject.
Temporal adverb modifying 'spielt', specifying the time.
Fused preposition+article (in+dem); introduces a locative PP and governs dative.
Masculine common noun, singular, dative as object of 'im'; indicates location.

sentences.target: Ich kenne den Musiker aus der Bar.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈkɛnə deːn ˈmuːzikɐ aʊ̯s deːɐ̯ baːʁ/

translations.de: Ich kenne den Musiker aus der Bar.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈkɛnə deːn ˈmuːzikɐ aʊ̯s deːɐ̯ baːʁ/
translations.en: I know the musician from the bar.
translations.fr: Je connais le musicien du bar.
translations.ko: 저는 그 음악가를 바에서 알게 됐어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 那个音乐家是我在酒吧认识的。
translations.yue: 嗰位音樂家係我喺酒吧識嘅。
translations.ru: Я знаю того музыканта из бара.
translations.pt: Eu conheço o músico do bar.
translations.vi: Tôi quen nhạc sĩ đó ở quán bar.
translations.nl: Ik ken die muzikant uit de bar.
translations.uk: Я знаю того музиканта з бару.
translations.hi: मैं उस संगीतकार को बार से जानता हूँ.
translations.el: Γνωρίζω τον μουσικό από το μπαρ.
translations.id: Saya kenal musisi itu dari bar.
translations.ro: Îl cunosc pe muzicianul de la bar.
translations.ja: その音楽家とはバーで知り合いました。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; syntactic subject of 'kenne'.
Finite transitive verb, 1st person singular present; takes 'den Musiker' as direct object.
Definite article, masculine singular accusative; marks 'Musiker' as direct object.
Masculine common noun, singular, accusative; direct object of 'kenne'.
Preposition meaning 'from/out of'; introduces a PP and governs dative.
Definite article, feminine singular dative; agrees with 'Bar' as object of 'aus'.
Feminine common noun, singular, dative; object of the preposition 'aus' indicating origin/source.

sentences.target: Meine Schwester trifft einen Musiker im Café.
sentences.reading: /ˈmaɪ̯nə ˈʃvɛstɐ trɪft ˈaɪ̯nən ˈmuːzikɐ ɪm kaˈfeː/

translations.de: Meine Schwester trifft einen Musiker im Café.
translations.ipa: /ˈmaɪ̯nə ˈʃvɛstɐ trɪft ˈaɪ̯nən ˈmuːzikɐ ɪm kaˈfeː/
translations.en: My sister is meeting a musician at the café.
translations.es: Mi hermana va a encontrarse con un músico en el café.
translations.fr: Ma sœur rencontre un musicien au café.
translations.it: Mia sorella incontra un musicista al bar.
translations.ko: 제 여동생은 카페에서 한 음악가를 만나고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我妹妹在咖啡馆和一位音乐家见面。
translations.yue: 我妹妹喺咖啡店同一位音樂家見面。
translations.ru: Моя сестра встречается с музыкантом в кафе.
translations.pt: Minha irmã vai se encontrar com um músico no café.
translations.he: אחותי נפגשת עם מוזיקאי בבית הקפה.
translations.tr: Kız kardeşim kafede bir müzisyenle buluşuyor.
translations.vi: Chị tôi đang gặp một nhạc sĩ ở quán cà phê.
translations.nl: Mijn zus ontmoet een muzikant in het café.
translations.uk: Моя сестра зустрічається з музикантом у кафе.
translations.hu: A nővérem egy zenésszel találkozik a kávézóban.
translations.hi: मेरी बहन कैफ़े में एक संगीतकार से मिल रही है.
translations.pl: Moja siostra spotyka się z muzykiem w kawiarni.
translations.el: Η αδελφή μου συναντά έναν μουσικό στο καφέ.
translations.nb: Søsteren min møter en musiker på kaféen.
translations.id: Kakak saya bertemu seorang musisi di kafe.
translations.sv: Min syster träffar en musiker på kaféet.
translations.ro: Sora mea se întâlnește cu un muzician la cafenea.
translations.cs: Moje sestra se v kavárně setká s hudebníkem.
translations.da: Min søster mødes med en musiker på caféen.
translations.ja: 妹はカフェで音楽家と会います。
